```{r}
library(readxl)
library(gprofiler2)
library(tools)
library(stringr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(furrr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(GOSemSim)
library(ggtree)
library(ape)
library(pheatmap)
library(reshape2)
#if have to: BiocManager::install(c("GenomicFeatures", "AnnotationDbi"))
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(tidyr)
library(DOSE) # for gosemsimplot
library(dplyr)
library(conflicted)

conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("slice", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("content", "httr")
```
